name: pluresdb
description: PluresDB Application Runtime — one plugin delivers CRDT store, reactive procedures, .px language, Chronos timeline, and P2P sync
author: Plures

exports.store: Core CRDT store with in-memory or IndexedDB persistence
exports.procedures: Query DSL, AgensRuntime, reactive event dispatch
exports.px: .px language: parse, compile, execute with ActionHandler
exports.createApp: One-call bootstrap: store + chronos + px runtime wired together

notes: Replaces separate praxis, chronos, and unum plugins. All capabilities consolidated into one dependency backed by Rust WASM.
